rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0001
rows.name:
This Divine Beast battleship's
interior is pretty different
from the Monoceros...

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0002
rows.name: What's Monoceros, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0003
rows.name:
Rex, you saw it, didn't you? It was
moored at Goldmund's dock, right?

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0004
rows.name:
It's that black ship
belonging to Shin's group.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0005
rows.name:
Oh, that amazing one... It's not
a Divine Beast ship, right?

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0006
rows.name:
I don't know the details,
but... it seems that way.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0007
rows.name:
Amazing, mo!! Tora wants
to see it too, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0008
rows.name:
You probably won't get a chance
to see it unless we run into
those Iira guys again.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0009
rows.name: Mo-mo-mo!?

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0010
rows.name:
Tora suddenly doesn't want
to see it anymore, mo...

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0011
rows.name:
Master, you change your
mind too quickly, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0012
rows.name:
The Monoceros was amazing, but this
Divine Beast battleship is too.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0013
rows.name:
Right? It's full of things
I've never seen before.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0014
rows.name:
This Divine Beast warship
is Superbia's latest
technology crystallized, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0015
rows.name:
Regular civilians aren't
even allowed inside, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0016
rows.name:
Even if you call it latest
technology, it just uses
salvaged tech, right?

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0017
rows.name:
...Actually, it seems they've
added their own improvements.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0018
rows.name:
Even this machine embedded here has
been modified beyond recognition.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0019
rows.name:
That's the control panel that
transmits signals to the
Divine Beast's nerves, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0020
rows.name:
Cables run from here through the
Divine Beast, controlling signals
by information type, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0021
rows.name: Wow... That's pretty impressive.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0022
rows.name:
This cable has 2.4 times the
speed and 12 times the capacity
of conventional ones, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0023
rows.name:
It's on a whole other level than
what other countries use, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0024
rows.name:
So if we put this on a small
Divine Beast vessel, its
efficiency would go way up!

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0025
rows.name: Ahem, that's right, mo!!

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0026
rows.name:
Those two seem to be having a
great time, but I don't understand
a word they're saying.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0027
rows.name: What do you think, Hana?

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0028
rows.name: How should I answer, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0029
rows.name: Those two are still naive, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0030
rows.name: Why is Master the one bragging, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0101
rows.name: Really?

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0102
rows.name:
Hana has a wide variety of knowledge
stored in her memory, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0103
rows.name:
Thanks to Master's hobbies, Hana is
especially good with machines, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0104
rows.name:
That's why Hana can easily keep up
with those two's conversation, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0105
rows.name:
Actually, if Hana got serious, she
could out-talk those two, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0106
rows.name: I-I see...

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0107
rows.name: I feel kind of out of place...

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0108
rows.name: Don't worry, Nia, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0109
rows.name:
Hana can even get excited
talking about Nia's favorite
insect dishes, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0110
rows.name: You're too kind...

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0111
rows.name:
But just so you know, I don't like
insects, I prefer fish dishes.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0112
rows.name: Mo!? Hana is sorry, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0113
rows.name:
Hana will update her database,
mo. Master set it carelessly,
so errors happen, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0114
rows.name:
Tora...! Who did you say
likes eating bugs...?

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0115
rows.name: Mo-mo! I sense killing intent, mo...!

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0116
rows.name:
Boss, we should hurry on ahead, mo!
Staying here is dangerous, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0117
rows.name: Is that so?

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0118
rows.name: Come on, come on, hurry up, mooo!

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0201
rows.name: Heheh! I'm glad you asked, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0202
rows.name:
This warship's technology is
also used in Hana's power
source and drive systems, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0203
rows.name: [ML:Feeling kind=Anger ]What a surprise, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0204
rows.name:
[ML:Feeling kind=Anger ]And what's more, Hana's version is
further improved and built in, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0205
rows.name: [ML:Feeling kind=Anger ]Even more surprising, mo!!

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0206
rows.name:
...Could it be that you stole
the Empire's technology?

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0207
rows.name: Listen, Tora, isn't that really risky?

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0208
rows.name:
For the sake of technological
progress, some risk is to
be expected, mo...

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0209
rows.name:
But the system built into
Hana can't be analyzed even
by Superbian engineers, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0210
rows.name:
There's absolutely nothing
to worry about, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0211
rows.name:
Hana became a little uneasy
after hearing the secret story
of her own birth, mo...

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0212
rows.name: I-it's all right, mo! Probably...

rows.label: kizunatalk012_msg0213
rows.name:
Now, Boss, enough chatting
here. Let's move on, mo!
